domain: Sami stállo Lapland stone cairns (60+ cairn sites Norway-Sweden border Viking Age 800-1050 CE; multifunctional: navigational landmarks + sacred sacrifice repositories + messaging posts + memorials; seasonal Mountain-Sami hunting-camp anchors; folklore-associated)
specific_mechanism: STALLO-MULTIFUNC-NODE: 5-role-tag multifunctional memory-node architecture for LLM agent memory. (1) Each memory node n tagged with subset T(n) ⊆ {NAVIGATIONAL, SACRED-RITUAL, REPOSITORY, MESSAGING-POST, MEMORIAL}. (2) Per-role retrieval channel: query type triggers role-filtered subset retrieval (e.g., nav-query → only NAV-tagged). (3) Same node can hold multiple roles (multifunctional). (4) Folklore-association: each node carries a 'lore-vector' v_lore linking to legend/context that enriches retrieval embedding. (5) Seasonal anchoring: temporal-seasonal mask M_season activates/deactivates nodes per season-tag (winter-tag vs summer-tag). (6) Differs from R479 OVOO-LANDMARK-TIER by 5-role-tag multifunctional structure (vs 3-tier hierarchical).
llm_application: STALLO-MULTIFUNC-NODE 5-role-tag multifunctional memory node + per-role retrieval channel + folklore lore-vector enrichment + seasonal-tag activation. Differs from R408 ICELANDIC-CHAIN (chain). R428 WAVE-BOWL-CACHE (eviction). R442 ADINKRA-SYMBOL-LM (semiotic). R454 TIERED-KV-CACHE (KV). R470 CHILOTE-PALAFITO (tier). R479 OVOO-LANDMARK-TIER (3-tier landmark — closest, but 3 hierarchical-tier vs 5-role-tag flat). Differs from Mem0 State 2026 (dual-store vector+graph — closest agent memory architecture). LangGraph Mem0 (scoped memory). OSS Memory Race 2026 (multifunctional). Topology Meta-Evolution (agent memory topology). Differs by 5-ROLE-TAG MULTIFUNCTIONAL + PER-ROLE RETRIEVAL CHANNEL + LORE-VECTOR + SEASONAL-TAG ACTIVATION.
novelty_claim: Mem0 + LangGraph + OSS Memory Race + Topology Meta cover tagged/scoped agent memory paradigm. STALLO-MULTIFUNC-NODE adds (a) 5-role tag multifunctional structure + (b) per-role retrieval channel + (c) folklore lore-vector + (d) seasonal activation. Recombination — borderline lookup.
